# Security Policy

If you discover a security vulnerability in this repository, please report it responsibly.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

1. Email the repository owner at `security@yourdomain.com` or open a private security issue on GitHub.
2. Provide a clear description of the vulnerability and steps to reproduce it.
3. Include the affected versions and any relevant environment details.

## Response

We will acknowledge the report as soon as possible and work to fix the issue promptly.

## Disclosure

Please do not disclose vulnerabilities publicly until they have been fixed.
